title: Expanded Weapon Enchantings
description: This Datapack and Mod allow to use Density, Breach, Impaling, and Wind Burst on a Weapon. It also allows you to mixing different Weapon Enchantments Types on the same Weapon!
body: # Expanded Weapon Enchantings **This Datapack and Mod** expands the Weapon Enchantments to include Impaling, Density, Breach, and Wind Burst on a weapon. It also allows you to mix different weapon enchantment types on the same Weapon **‎◾Examples:** ![Expanded Weapons Enchantings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff2fe7a7ba62d1c23f82a2d31e56a18907672408.jpeg) ![Expanded Weapons Enchantings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/660f863ee0933dd0eab5e88e5a7ed7e656120b21.jpeg) ![Expanded Weapons Enchantings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5188edbfd0fb143ab38924380f93446ac1413833.jpeg) ## Details📝 - **Expanded Weapon Enchantings** is **compatible** with versions **1.21 to 1.21.11** - **Expanded Weapon Enchantings** adds new **(expansion)** to enchanting table🌐 - **Expanded Weapon Enchantings** is compatible with any **enchantings datapacks** - **No** it is necessary to **unzip** the downloaded file 🗂️ ## More Projects:
